days.label: Push Day — Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 125 — earned it with 10/10/10 RPE 7/7/7 last week. Clean technique, pause at chest, drive through heels.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 35 — second week here. 10/10/10 at RPE 8 last week (top of range but too hard). Get all sets to RPE 7 to earn the bump to 40. 30 degree incline.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 25 — clean 10/10/10 but RPE 8 across the board. Dial in form and get to RPE 7 to bump up to 30.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 10 — crushed 12/12/12 RPE 6/7/7 with the 10s. Big jump (50%) but DB increments are 5 lb minimum. If 15 feels brutal, drop back to 10 and ride out a few more weeks.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: UP 5 lb from 95 — earned it with 10/10/10 RPE 7/7/7 last week. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked, full lockout.

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Rope Extension
exercises.notes: NEW — rotating in from rope pushdowns for variety. Face away from pulley, rope overhead, full stretch at bottom. Pick a weight you can hit 12-15 at RPE 7-8.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps — 5 min

days.label: Pull Day — Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 195 — pull day was skipped last week, so let's actually test this load. Brace hard, pull through the floor, controlled descent. Don't skip this one — pull day's the easiest one to bail on.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 — same target as last week (pull day skipped). Each side, squeeze at top, control the descent.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Same as last week's plan (skipped). Wide grip on lat bar, pull bar to upper chest, squeeze lats. Pick weight for 8-10 at RPE 7-8.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Same as last week's plan (skipped). Rope at upper pulley, pull to face, external rotation at the end. Light weight, focus on the squeeze.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 60 — same target as last week (skipped). Strict form, no swing.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 25 — same target as last week (skipped). Neutral grip, control the negative. Bump to 30 once you hit 12/12/12 at RPE 7.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back — 5 min

days.label: Leg Day — Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 — second straight week of 8/8/8 RPE 8. In range but not at top. Push for 9-10 reps this week to break through and earn the bump. Below parallel, brace core.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 135 — 10/10/10 last week but set 1 RPE 8. Need all sets at RPE 7 to earn the bump to 145. Slight knee bend, feel the hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 — you self-bumped from 25 last week and hit 10/10/10 RPE 8 (in range, not at top). Push for 11-12 reps this week. Each leg, rear foot on bench.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 — 11/12/12 RPE 7 last week. So close — set 1 was 11 instead of 12. Hit 12/12/12 to earn the bump back to 65. Drive through heels, full hip extension.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Calf Raises
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 — 16/15/15 RPE 8 last week (all in range, near bottom). Push toward 18-20 reps before bumping weight. Single-leg, hold DB at side, pause at top.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Progression: 12/12/12 RPE 7 last week — earned a harder version. This week: slow tempo (3 sec out, 3 sec back) OR hold a 5-10 lb DB behind your head. Keep lower back pressed to floor.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors — 5 min
